nasb.text: and the prophet Jeremiah said, “Amen! May the Lord do so; may the Lord confirm your words which you have prophesied to bring back the vessels of the Lord’s house and all the exiles, from Babylon to this place.

esv.text: and the prophet Jeremiah said, “Amen! May the Lord do so; may the Lord make the words that you have prophesied come true, and bring back to this place from Babylon the vessels of the house of the Lord, and all the exiles.

cnv.text: “阿們！願耶和華這樣行，願耶和華使你預言的話應驗，把耶和華殿中的器皿和所有被擄的人，都從巴比倫帶回這地方來。

ccb.text: “诚愿如此！愿耶和华这样做，愿耶和华应验你的预言，把祂殿中的器皿和被掳的人从巴比伦带回来。
